Claude Shannon was born on April 30, 1916.

Claude Shannon's three key contributions to information theory include: 1) Founding information theory and introducing the concept of the bit as a unit of information, 2) Developing the Shannon entropy formula which quantifies information, and 3) Establishing the Shannon limit which defines the maximum data transmission rate of a channel for error-free communication.
Three family-friendly activities in Tokyo this weekend: Ueno Zoo, Sunshine City entertainment complex, and KZA Tokyo educational park.
Saturday's weather in Tokyo is cloudy with a 20%-30% chance of rain.
Sunshine City is mostly indoors with attractions including an aquarium, museum, shops, and Pokémon Center, making it the most suitable activity regardless of weather.
